# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Custom build script or commands to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_script:
        description: 'Custom deployment commands to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for script execution'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      environment:
        description: 'Target deployment environment'
        required: false
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - development
          - staging
          - production
      run_tests:
        description: 'Run tests before deployment'
        required: false
        default: true
        type: boolean
      test_script:
        description: 'Custom test script or commands'
        required: false
        type: string
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/build-artifacts
  LOG_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}/build-logs

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Inputs
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    outputs:
      has_deploy: ${{ steps.check.outputs.has_deploy }}
      has_tests: ${{ steps.check.outputs.has_tests }}
    steps:
      - name: Check inputs and context
        id: check
        run: |
          echo "Workflow triggered by: ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref }}"

          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            if [ -n "${{ inputs.deploy_script }}" ]; then
              echo "has_deploy=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            else
              echo "has_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            fi

            if [ "${{ inputs.run_tests }}" = "true" ] && [ -n "${{ inputs.test_script }}" ]; then
              echo "has_tests=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            else
              echo "has_tests=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            fi
          else
            echo "has_deploy=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            echo "has_tests=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  build:
    name: Custom Build
    needs: validate
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter, linux]
    timeout-minutes: 120
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup build environment
        run: |
          mkdir -p "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}"
          mkdir -p "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}"
          echo "Build started at $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" | tee "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          echo "Runner: $(hostname)"
          echo "OS: $(uname -a)"
          echo "Available disk space:"
          df -h .
          echo "Available memory:"
          free -h || true

      - name: Execute custom build script (workflow_dispatch)
        if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Executing Custom Build Script ===" | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          echo "Working directory: $(pwd)" | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"

          cat << 'BUILD_SCRIPT_EOF' > /tmp/custom_build.sh
          ${{ inputs.build_script }}
          BUILD_SCRIPT_EOF

          chmod +x /tmp/custom_build.sh
          bash /tmp/custom_build.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          BUILD_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

          echo "Build script exited with code: $BUILD_EXIT_CODE" | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          exit $BUILD_EXIT_CODE

      - name: Execute default build (push/PR)
        if: github.event_name != 'workflow_dispatch'
        run: |
          echo "=== Executing Default Build ===" | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"

          if [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
            echo "Found Makefile, running make..." | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
            make build 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          elif [ -f "build.sh" ]; then
            echo "Found build.sh, executing..." | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
            chmod +x build.sh
            ./build.sh 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            echo "Found package.json, running npm build..." | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
            npm ci 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
            npm run build 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
            echo "Found pom.xml, running Maven build..." | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
            mvn clean package -B 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
            echo "Found Gradle build file, running Gradle build..." | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
            ./gradlew build 2>&1 | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          else
            echo "No recognized build system found. Skipping build step." | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"
          fi

      - name: Collect build artifacts
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "Build completed at $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" | tee -a "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}/build.log"

          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -r dist "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "build" ]; then
            cp -r build "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}/" || true
          fi
          if [ -d "target" ]; then
            cp -r target/*.jar "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}/" 2>/dev/null || true
            cp -r target/*.war "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}/" 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Upload build logs
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.LOG_DIR }}
          retention-days: 90

  test:
    name: Custom Tests
    needs: [validate, build]
    if: needs.validate.outputs.has_tests == 'true'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter, linux]
    timeout-minutes: 60
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Execute custom test script
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Executing Custom Test Script ==="

          cat << 'TEST_SCRIPT_EOF' > /tmp/custom_test.sh
          ${{ inputs.test_script }}
          TEST_SCRIPT_EOF

          chmod +x /tmp/custom_test.sh
          bash /tmp/custom_test.sh
          TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?

          echo "Test script exited with code: $TEST_EXIT_CODE"
          exit $TEST_EXIT_CODE

  deploy:
    name: Custom Deployment
    needs: [validate, build, test]
    if: |
      always() &&
      needs.build.result == 'success' &&
      (needs.test.result == 'success' || needs.test.result == 'skipped') &&
      needs.validate.outputs.has_deploy == 'true'
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter, linux]
    timeout-minutes: 60
    environment:
      name: ${{ inputs.environment }}
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-${{ inputs.environment }}
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Pre-deployment checks
        run: |
          echo "=== Pre-Deployment Checks ==="
          echo "Environment: ${{ inputs.environment }}"
          echo "Deploying ref: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"

          if [ "${{ inputs.environment }}" = "production" ]; then
            echo "WARNING: Production deployment initiated by ${{ github.actor }}"
            if [ "${{ github.ref }}" != "refs/heads/main" ]; then
              echo "ERROR: Production deployments are only allowed from the main branch."
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

      - name: Execute custom deployment script
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ inputs.environment }}
          BUILD_ARTIFACTS_PATH: ${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}
          GIT_COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          GIT_REF: ${{ github.ref }}
          DEPLOYER: ${{ github.actor }}
        run: |
          echo "=== Executing Custom Deployment Script ==="

          cat << 'DEPLOY_SCRIPT_EOF' > /tmp/custom_deploy.sh
          ${{ inputs.deploy_script }}
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT_EOF

          chmod +x /tmp/custom_deploy.sh
          bash /tmp/custom_deploy.sh
          DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE=$?

          echo "Deployment script exited with code: $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE"
          exit $DEPLOY_EXIT_CODE

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "=== Post-Deployment Summary ==="
          echo "Deployment to ${{ inputs.environment }} completed successfully"
          echo "Completed at: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup
    needs: [build, test, deploy]
    if: always()
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter, linux]
    steps:
      - name: Clean up temporary files
        run: |
          echo "=== Cleaning up temporary files ==="
          rm -f /tmp/custom_build.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -f /tmp/custom_test.sh 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -f /tmp/custom_deploy.sh 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Clean up workspace
        run: |
          echo "Cleaning workspace to free disk space on self-hosted runner"
          rm -rf "${{ env.BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR }}" 2>/dev/null || true
          rm -rf "${{ env.LOG_DIR }}" 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Report workflow summary
        run: |
          echo "## Workflow Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Item | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Trigger** | ${{ github.event_name }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Actor** | ${{ github.actor }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Ref** | ${{ github.ref }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Commit** | ${{ github.sha }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Runner** | $(hostname) |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Build Result** | ${{ needs.build.result }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Test Result** | ${{ needs.test.result }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| **Deploy Result** | ${{ needs.deploy.result }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          if [ "${{ github.event_name }}" = "workflow_dispatch" ]; then
            echo "| **Environment** | ${{ inputs.environment }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
